reason: Check backend layering and API/use-case/repository separation.
Check schema and migration edits follow project database conventions.
Check Session remains message shell and not business ownership root.
Check runtime delivery remains behind control-plane launch and continuation use cases.
Check RuntimeSessionExecutionAnchor is the control-plane lookup source.
Check subject association and runtime trace lookup contracts.
Check frontend Session and WorkspacePanel consume backend projection rather than reconstructing facts.
Check generated DTO and service mapper safety.
Check lifecycle/session stores do not preserve duplicate session list facts.
Check LifecycleRun observation remains single-run projection for Session WorkspacePanel.
Check cross-layer DTO generation and contract drift.
